title: Project Engineer — Offshore Mechanical Systems (Contract)
description_raw:
Brunel Energy are seeking a Project Engineer to support mechanical systems delivery on an offshore platform tie-back project in the Central North Sea. The role is engaged outside IR35 via the client’s PSC programme.

This is a PM-adjacent role with full accountability for the mechanical package delivery:
- HVAC and HVAC skid packages for the new deck module
- Piping and pipework modification packages (p&id alignment, spool fabrication oversight)
- Rotating equipment (pumps, compressors) installation and commissioning readiness
- Offshore LNG transfer system interface

Key responsibilities:
- Act as single point of accountability for mechanical package delivery
- Issue and track inspection and test records for mechanical scopes
- Attend weekly project controls meetings and maintain 3-week lookaheads
- Coordinate with offshore hook-up team during topsides installation campaign
- Own mechanical punch lists and ensure clearances before offshore sailing

Profile:
- HNC/HND Mechanical Engineering; ONC acceptable with strong offshore experience
- 8+ years’ offshore oil and gas mechanical engineering
- BOSIET/HUET mandatory; GWO preferred

Rate: £550/day outside IR35
Duration: 9 months
Start: ASAP
Location: Aberdeen (office) + offshore rotation
